ai_summary: Enviro Infra Engineers Limited (EIEL) has secured a significant domestic contract valued at ₹126.78 Crores (excluding GST) from Uttar Pradesh Jal Nigam (Rural) for a 45 MLD Sewage Treatment Plant project under a Hybrid Annuity Model. This order provides a material boost to the company's pipeline, including 15 years of operation and maintenance, ensuring long-term revenue visibility. The document indicates no apparent red flags, related party transactions, or promoter interests, suggesting an arm's length agreement.
